  },
  {
    "type": "change_ui_state",
    "time_start_ms": 3750,
    "time_end_ms": 6000,
    "description": "The instructions on the screen update to include the task details: 'Here is your task: Imagine you need to book a return domestic flight within Australia for an upcoming trip. Using the Flight Centre website, search for flights, select your preferred options, and proceed through the booking flow including reviewing any ancillaries and seat selection. Please think out loud as you go - share what you're looking at, what you're thinking, and any reactions you have. You can stop once you reach the page asking for traveller details (you don't need to enter any personal information or complete the actual purchase).'",
    "confidence": 0.9,
    "frame_description": "Dark grey screen with white text instructions for the task in the center, browser tabs visible at the top, and a small video feed of the user in the top right."
  },

    "description": "User clicks the 'Open' button to proceed to the Flight Centre website.",

  },
